paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of July 22, 2026, with a change of -1.05% from the prior close and -24.28% over a window of 21 sessions.

There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours, but recent news includes an announcement of the company's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026, as reported by TradingView on July 21, 2026.

Recent SEC filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, effective July 10, 2026, and an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, with total net proceeds of approximately $416.81 million, which will be used for general corporate purposes.
